title: Grover's Algorithm: Quantum Speedup for Search and Symmetric Cryptography
description: Understand Grover's algorithm and its quadratic speedup for search problems. Learn how it affects symmetric cryptography, hash functions, and why 256-bit keys become essential for post-quantum security.
learningObjectives: Explain what Grover's algorithm does and its quadratic speedup
Understand how Grover's algorithm applies to cryptographic attacks
Calculate the post-quantum security level of symmetric algorithms
Determine appropriate key sizes for quantum resistance
Differentiate between Grover's and Shor's impact on cryptography
Apply the 'double the key size' rule for quantum resistance
